CMSC - Computer Science

CMSC100 Bits and Bytes of Computer and Information Sciences (1 Credit) Students are introduced to the ﬁelds (and disciplines) of computer science and information science within a small classroom setting. They will learn to make a successful transition from high school to the university, while exploring study skills, student success plans and research opportunities. Cross-listed with: INST101. Restriction: For ﬁrst time freshmen and ﬁrst time transfer students; or permission of CMNS-Computer Science department. Credit Only Granted for: CMSC100 or INST101.

CMLT469 The Continental Novel (3 Credits) The novel in translation from Stendhal through the existentialists, selected from literatures of France, Germany, Italy, Russia, and Spain.
